---
title: "Sovereign Bead System"
generated_at: "2026-03-18 22:12:48"
authoritative_source: "hall_beads"
---

# Sovereign Bead System

`tasks.qmd` is a projection of the Hall of Records. Do not edit bead state here.

- Repository: `repo:/home/morderith/Corvus/CStar/.tmp/chant-autobot-smoke`
- Open Beads: `0`
- Set Pending: `0`
- Set Beads: `0`
- In Progress: `1`
- Ready For Review: `0`
- Needs Triage: `0`
- Blocked: `1`
- Resolved: `0`
- Archived: `0`
- Superseded: `0`

## Open Beads
- None

## Set-Pending Beads
- None

## Set Beads
- None

## Beads In Progress
- [/] [bead:live-autobot-direct] `title_slug.py` :: Direct AutoBot isolation run for title_slug.py after chant/orchestrator probe. | scan: scan:live-probe-title-slug | baseline: 1.00 | agent: AUTOBOT | contracts: tests/test_title_slug.py, README.md | acceptance: title_slug.py exists, exposes slugify(text), and the bundled unittest suite passes.

## Beads Ready For Review
- None

## Beads Requiring Triage
- None

## Blocked Beads
- [!] [bead:98e2152f8a91] `title_slug.py` :: Implement the README utility by creating title_slug.py with a slugify function and CLI. | scan: scan:live-probe-title-slug | baseline: 1.00 | contracts: tests/test_title_slug.py, README.md | acceptance: title_slug.py exists, exposes slugify(text), and the bundled unittest suite passes. | triage: Orchestrator: Worker failed (exit 1). Last log:   code: 'ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND',   url: 'file:///home/morderith/Corvus/CStar/.tmp/chant-autobot-smoke/cstar.ts' }  Node.js v25.8.1

## Resolved Beads
- None

## Archived Beads
- None

## Superseded Beads
- None
